name: The Bakersfield 3: A Tale of Murder and Motherhood
original_name: The Bakersfield 3: A Tale of Murder and Motherhood
overview: In the spring of 2018 over the course of just 34 days, a young woman and man went missing, and another young man was murdered in Bakersfield, California.
